title: nelitris forsteri
intro: Nelitris forsteri, also known as Nelumbo nucifera, is a type of aquatic plant commonly referred to as the sacred lotus, belonging to the Nelumbo genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, particularly in Ayurvedic and Chinese medicine, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Nelitris forsteri include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and reduce stress, as well as its potential to aid in weight loss and improve skin health. Nelitris forsteri can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in traditional cooking and as a natural dye.
